center.name: James Macdonald (ornithologist)
center.summary: James Macdonald (ornithologist)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Kidepo lark，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Kidepo lark (Corypha kidepoensis) is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae found in South Sudan and Uganda

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Kidepo lark (Corypha kidepoensis) is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae found in South Sudan and Uganda
